states.name: Theo
states.title: Cerulean Sorcerer
states.description: When the Empire came and took away everything he had, Theo didn't give in to despair. Here, among the charred ruins of his hometown—the place where they once led such peaceful lives—he makes his vow. To protect the white flowers that started blooming here again. To become a full-fledged Blue Dragon Knight, one that can defend his beloved sister.

states.name: Theo
states.title: Cerulean Sorcerer
states.description: When Rizette comes home after carrying out all her daily duties—securing food supplies, maintaining order in the neighboring villages, recruiting new Blue Dragon Knights, scouting the territory ocuppied by Bergarian forces—Theo always waits for her with a homemade meal. In his hands even the plainest ingredients turn into the finest cuisine. "I'm sorry I can't do much more yet," he says modestly, and Rizette's heart swells with pride.

states.name: Theo
states.title: Cerulean Sorcerer
states.description:
After Rizette leaves in the morning, Theo quietly devotes himself to his training. A particular memory always keeps him company—the memory of a man who showed him kindness, even if in a stiff, awkward way; a man who set out to be a hero and put his life on the line in order to atone for his past crimes. 
Every day, Theo strives to get a little stronger, so that he can keep his legacy alive.
